title: Why ChatGPT isn't good at building automations
summary: David Ondrej argues that ChatGPT has shortcomings when applied to building automations. The video promotes Creao, an alternative platform positioned as better suited for automation tasks.
writeup: This video is an opinion piece from David Ondrej arguing that ChatGPT falls short when used to build automations. It locates the problem in inherent limitations of large language models for the workflow automation domain rather than in user error or prompt quality. The takeaway: building reliable automations exposes shortcomings that LLMs carry by design.
